title: NeuralTrust Agent Posture
description: NeuralTrust Agent Posture registers agents in a centralized trust registry with defined capabilities, creating a unified inventory across platforms to assess risk, monitor behavior, and enforce consistent security controls.

items: Register all agents in an internal trust registry

Support for Gen AI Security Project - Agentic Security Threat Modeling Approach, Identify system-wide non-human Identities & Auth Protocols, Draft policy for Agent privilege boundaries, Draft policy Agent for tool scopes
